zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Morrison於1761年2月10日出生在美國緬因州約克威爾斯時，他的父親Samuel Morrison Sr28歲，母親Huldah Stewart21歲。他於1780年1月11日與Margaret Webber在美國緬因州約克威爾斯結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1842年9月13日在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可劍橋大學默里 利默里克享年81歲，埋葬在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可林斯林斯 巴普蒂斯特 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Morrison于1761年2月10日出生在美国缅因州約克威爾斯时，他的父亲Samuel Morrison Sr28岁，母亲Huldah Stewart21岁。他于1780年1月11日与Margaret Webber在美国缅因州約克威爾斯结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1842年9月13日在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可劍橋大學默里 利默里克享年81岁，埋葬在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可林斯林斯 巴普蒂斯特 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1775: Lincoln, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Lincoln, Massachusetts, United States 1790: Washington, Massachusetts, United States 1820, Washington, Maine, United States 1839: Aroostook, Maine, United States
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.
Lewis and Clark set out from St. Louis, MO to explore the West.

historicEvents.title: Whitehead Light
historicEvents.description: In 1804, President Thomas Jefferson authorized the creation of a light station on Whitehead Island. The light house went into service by 1807. It is the third-oldest light house in Maine. Whitehead Light still exists as the private property of Pine Island Camp, a non-profit organization.

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.
Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Morrison was born on 10 February 1761, in Wells, York, Maine, United States, his father, Samuel Morrison Sr, was 28 and his mother, Huldah Stewart, was 21. He married Margaret Webber on 11 January 1780, in Wells, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 13 September 1842, in New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United States, at the age of 81, and was buried in Linneus Baptist Church, Linneus, Aroostook, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Morrison est né le 10 février 1761, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis, son père, Samuel Morrison Sr, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Huldah Stewart, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Webber le 11 janvier 1780, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 13 septembre 1842, à New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Linneus Baptist Church, Linneus, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis.

Januar 1780 in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Margaret Webber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 13. ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Morrisonが1761年2月10日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズで生まれた時，父Samuel Morrison Srは28歳，母Huldah Stewartは21歳であった。1780年1月11日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズでMargaret Webberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1842年9月13日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクニュー リメリックで81歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクリネウスリネウス バプティスト チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Linneus Baptist Church, Linneus, Aroosto: 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 리니우스 리니우스 바프티스트 c후르치
ko.New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United S: 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Morrison(이)가 1761년 2월 10일 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Morrison Sr(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Huldah Stewart(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1780년 1월 11일 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 Margaret Webber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1842년 9월 13일 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 리니우스 리니우스 바프티스트 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Morrison nasceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1761, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Samuel Morrison Sr, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Huldah Stewart, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Webber em 11 de janeiro de 1780, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1842, em New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Linneus Baptist Church, Linneus, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Morrison родился 10 февраля 1761 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Samuel Morrison Sr было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Huldah Stewart, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Webber 11 января 1780 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 13 сентября 1842 г. в местности ню лимирикк, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности линнеус баптист чурч, линнеус, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Morrison nació el 10 de febrero de 1761, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, su papá, Samuel Morrison Sr, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Huldah Stewart, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Webber el 11 de enero de 1780, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1842, en New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Linneus Baptist Church, Linneus, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos.
